title: Define Wave 29 manager provider handoff evidence contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the additive assignment evidence payload, mobile state map, and module boundaries for manager-to-provider handoff success, retry, unauthorized, and session-expired paths.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture docs define assign-provider success payload with assignment snapshot and latest timeline event
UI/UX map documents success, retry, unauthorized, and session-expired handoff states
Module map clarifies backend/mobile ownership for assignment evidence consumption
